goals.title: 优化 VideoFlow：关闭账号注册入口/后台注册能力；修复 Provider base_url 配错导致上传任务出现 HTML 响应...
goals.objective: 优化 VideoFlow：关闭账号注册入口/后台注册能力；修复 Provider base_url 配错导致上传任务出现 HTML 响应 in-operator 报错，给出生产可读错误；后台任务列表显示视频链接/下载、避免文件名乱码、可打开结果详情；默认进入工作台，后台仅通过 /admin 或管理员入口访问；增加任务删除功能并清理任务数据/文件。完成测试、构建、提交并推送。
goals.evidence: Implemented registration gate, workbench-first routing with /admin admin entry, provider HTML/API-root friendly errors, admin video download/detail/delete controls, job deletion cleanup. Verified npm run lint; npm test; npm run build. Committed and pushed main commit 88a07dc.

codexObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json: G001-videoflow-provider-base-url-html 优化 VideoFlow：关闭账号注册入口/后台注册能力；修复 Provider base_url 配错导致上传任务出现 HTML 响应...
